creator: josh@tcbug.org
text:
Yes, I noticed the same behavior on 7.0Beta4 and 7.0RC1, DVDs that play fine 
on 6.x don't play on 7.x

Unfortunately about all I can do is shovel this upstream and see what they 
say.  I'll keep this pr updated.

-- 
Thanks,

Josh Paetzel
